name: figma
description: Figma workflows for design implementation, Code Connect templates, design system rules, FigJam diagrams, and Slides.

interface.shortDescription: Design, Code Connect, FigJam, and Slides workflows powered by the Figma integration
interface.longDescription: Figma workflows for implementing designs in code, creating Code Connect templates for published Figma components, generating project-specific design system rules, and working with FigJam diagrams and Slides decks.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a Figma design and implement it in code
Create Code Connect templates for my components
Build or update a screen in Figma
Create a FigJam diagram or Slides deck
